Event: Titanic Excavation - Jul 2025
Event Date: 16/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A235
Indomitable Force

Triggers: 3 sec

Piercing Cold
Unleashes an ice storm that lasts 5 sec.
During this time, icicles fly out of the artifact owner every second, hitting 2 random enemy units. The icicles deal 375000 magic damage on hit and may freeze the target (30% chance) for 3 sec or tear through their armor (70% chance). Frozen units can't move and attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec.
When their armor is torn, the units take 250000 pure damage, and their physical armor is reduced by 25% for 3 sec. These units also take 300000 physical damage for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
